summary: Mapbox CI secrets configured and injected into GitHub Actions workflow. DEPLOY.md updated with new Mapbox secrets documentation and background GPS physical device test requirements. CocoaPods cache key update deferred to immediate post-merge. CI pipeline ready for Story 3.0 Mapbox migration.

artifacts.description: Updated CI workflow with Mapbox secret injection (MAPBOX_DOWNLOADS_TOKEN + MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN) in env blocks for both analyze-and-test and build-apk jobs. MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN added to .env file generation.

Comprehensive deployment guide updated with Mapbox tokens documentation, background GPS physical device test requirements (Android foreground service + iOS blue indicator), and roadmap section clarifying CocoaPods cache strategy.
Iteration 3 DevOps handoff documenting all CI/CD changes, secret configuration requirements, and deferred CocoaPods cache key update plan.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.details: All 3 artifacts present: .github/workflows/ci.yml (secrets injected), docs/DEPLOY.md (Mapbox tokens + background GPS tests documented), docs/handoffs/devops.md (complete handoff)

qualityGates.name: ci_checks_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.details: CI pipeline syntax validated. dart analyze (0 errors/0 warnings), flutter test (43 pass/1 pre-existing fail). APK build ready pending secret configuration. No new violations introduced.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.details: No secrets hardcoded in YAML or committed files. All sensitive tokens injected via GitHub Actions secrets. Mapbox public token (pk.*) safe to expose; download token (sk.*) kept in secrets.

notes: MAPBOX_DOWNLOADS_TOKEN and MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN must be configured in GitHub repository secrets before Story 3.0 PR runs. Without these, iOS pod install and Android Gradle build will fail.

CocoaPods cache key update (explicit cache@v4 with Podfile.lock hash) deferred to immediate post-merge of Story 3.0 to avoid blocking current PR. This will improve subsequent CI run times by 5-10 minutes.
QA hard gate BUG-3-1 (widget test for route_map_preview.dart) must be resolved before Story 3.0 PR can merge. DevOps blocking status is: waiting for frontend to create widget test.
